title: Founding of the Order of Aten
body: When Secundus was still half timber and rumor, a company of knights gathered beneath a comet the people called Aten's Finger. They pledged not to a crown but to a discipline: shield the weak, judge the cruel, and let no wizard's pride outpace a citizen's right to dawn. The first chapterhouse rose beside the old forum; its altar bore a simple golden cross, not as vanity but as a mirror—light given form so every paladin would remember what they reflected into the world. Generations later the Order still reads that same light in the smoke of forges and the hush of libraries, binding Telvar's streets to an oath older than any single throne.
